---
title: "Diagnostics — Table 1 & p-value distributions"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
params:
  subset_dir: "CSF_Spectronaut_protein_swap/good_data"
  normalization: "log2"
  base_dir: ".."
  truth_path: ""
  truth_kind: "protein_swap"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(ggplot2)
})
source(file.path(params$base_dir, "R/paths.R"))
source(file.path(params$base_dir, "R/ground_truth.R"))
source(file.path(params$base_dir, "R/comparison_table.R"))
source(file.path(params$base_dir, "R/figures.R"))

cell_dir <- file.path(params$base_dir, params$subset_dir,
                      params$normalization, "swap")

truth_df <- switch(params$truth_kind,
  protein_swap     = truth_protein_swap(file.path(params$base_dir, params$truth_path)),
  sample_swap      = truth_sample_swap(file.path(params$base_dir, params$truth_path)),
  mix_of_proteome  = truth_mix_of_proteome(file.path(params$base_dir, params$truth_path)),
  stop("Unknown truth_kind: ", params$truth_kind)
)
```

## Cell

`r params$subset_dir` / `r params$normalization`

## Table 1

```{r}
tbl <- build_table1(cell_dir, truth_df)
knitr::kable(tbl, digits = 3)
```

## p-value histograms

```{r}
packages <- c("MSstats+", "MSstats", "MaxLFQ_limma", "DEqMS",
              "msqrob2", "prolfqua", "limpa")
model_files <- file.path(cell_dir, packages,
                         vapply(packages, function(p) .model_filename[[p]], character(1)))
loaded <- lapply(seq_along(model_files), function(i) {
  if (!file.exists(model_files[i])) return(NULL)
  d <- fread(model_files[i])
  d$Package <- packages[i]
  d
})
combined <- rbindlist(loaded, fill = TRUE)
if (nrow(combined)) {
  combined <- label_proteins(as.data.frame(combined), truth_df)
  print(fig_pvalue_histogram(combined))
}
```

## Observed-vs-claimed FDR

```{r}
if (nrow(combined)) print(fig_fdr_curve(combined))
```
